name: Comment
description: JSON Structure description of the Gitea Comment entity.

assets.description: Attachments contains files attached to the comment

body.description: Body contains the comment text content

html_url.description: HTMLURL is the web URL for viewing the comment

id.description: ID is the unique identifier for the comment

issue_url.description: IssueURL is the API URL for the issue

original_author.description: OriginalAuthor is the original author name (for imported comments)

original_author_id.description: OriginalAuthorID is the original author ID (for imported comments)

pull_request_url.description: PRURL is the API URL for the pull request (if applicable)
